column9:
Qualified Diesel Mechanic
- Lichtenburg, Potchefstroom, Klerkdorp, Kathu, Upington.

Requirements: 
A recognised Diesel Mechanic qualification is essential.
Minimum of 3 years' experience as a Diesel Mechanic
Accurate working ability with high attention to detail is essential.
Excellent planning and organising skills with the ability to work in a systematic manner.
Driver's licence (including a Code 14 and PDP) is a prerequisite.
Must be prepared to do rotational standby duties.

CV & ID: applications@laubstar.co.za

QR Code

column6:
For more than 40 years, #Laubstar Fleet Services has built a trusted reputation in South Africa’s commercial vehicle industry. Grounded in integrity, technical expertise and hands-on experience, we proudly support the transport businesses that keep our economy moving.

As a multi-franchise dealership, Laubstar represents globally respected brands including #FAWTrucks, #Iveco, #Powerstar and #UDTrucks. Our strategic footprint along the N12 and N14 corridors — with branches in Klerksdorp, Potchefstroom, Lichtenburg, Kathu and Upington — positions us to effectively serve clients across the North West and Northern Cape regions.

We partner with businesses of all sizes, delivering dependable trucks, trailers and fully integrated support solutions tailored to each operation. Our focus is simple: provide the right vehicle, the right support and the right long-term partnership to keep your fleet moving forward.

Connect with our team today
https://laubstar.co.za/about-us/
